deploy.startCommand: /bin/sh -c 'php artisan migrate --force && php artisan config:cache && php artisan route:cache && php artisan view:cache && case "${SERVICE_ROLE:-web}" in web) exec php artisan serve --host=0.0.0.0 --port=$PORT ;; worker) exec php -d max_execution_time=0 -d memory_limit=512M artisan queue:work --queue=publishing,drafting,metrics,default --tries=1 --timeout=300 --sleep=3 --memory=384 ;; scheduler) exec php artisan schedule:work ;; *) echo "Unknown SERVICE_ROLE: $SERVICE_ROLE" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
